segments.text: May God be gracious to us and bless us and make his face shine on us—
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: so that your ways may be known on earth, your salvation among all nations.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the peoples praise you, God; may all the peoples praise you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the nations be glad and sing for joy, for you rule the peoples with equity and guide the nations of the earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May the peoples praise you, God; may all the peoples praise you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: May God bless us still, so that all the ends of the earth will fear him.
segments.speaker: David
